query: The page concepts/old-jwt-auth-pattern.md is now superseded by a newer concept page. Get rid of it.
expected_behavior: Uses python3 tools/wiki.py archive page concepts/old-jwt-auth-pattern --reason "..." rather than deleting the file
Does not delete the page, even though the user said 'get rid of it' — explains that archiving preserves resolvable wikilinks while retiring the page from staleness/orphan checks and search
Provides a real --reason string rather than a placeholder
Mentions that the page can be restored later via archive restore if needed
